description.short: Nestled in Banda Aceh, known for its rich history and stunning coastal mosques, Capital O 2018 Ring Road Guest House Syariah offers an inviting retreat for two travelers. Experience a seamless stay with convenient express check-in/check-out and a delightful breakfast takeaway service that caters to early adventures. Each room is designed for ultimate comfort, featuring air conditioning, complimentary water, and reliable wireless internet to keep connected. Enjoy refreshing showers that ensure relaxation after a day of exploring the lush surroundings. This guest house is perfect for travelers seeking both comfort and cultural immersion in this enchanting city. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Capital O 2018 Ring Road Guest House Syariah
comments.reviewPositives:
Nothing and never like it. 
It was a fraud..Avoid OYO if you can.

I suggest you to cancel directly if the contact for this property is  +62 817 788016.. this number always off and never answer our questions through chat or email..

they didn’t charge us before our stay as promised, but charged after that as they said, we never show up at the property. They are cheaters. The truth was, we showed up, but there were no rooms for us and they didn’t give us our rooms.

I arrived at night at this property, and all the rooms were full. They said they didn’t accept my booking, but the status was confirmed at this application. You know, I was anxious as I booked 18 rooms for 36 people.

So, I asked the responsibilities of the property to search the accommodation for us that night. They searched everywhere and found an empty training centre for us. Okay, that’s enough for that night, as long as I didn’t abandon 36 people on the street. I appreciated the manager and receptionists
 of this accommodation that night for their efforts to help us found the other accommodation.

But, I will avoid OYO all my life. No more..

For booking.com: please block this kind of troublesome partners, so we customers will feel safe to book hotels through your application.

Eva
Super OYO Capital O 2018 Ring Road Guest House Syariah

comments.reviewComments: Recommendations for tourists to stay here, the service is good and polite. The rooms are equipped with a TV, wifi, air conditioning, and come with 2 bottled waters. Overall, it's good 👌.
comments.originalComment: Rekomendasi buat para wisatawan buat nginap di sini, pelayanan baik dan sopan.  Kamarnya dilengkapi tv, wifi , ac dan dapat 2 air mineral kemasan. comments.responseText: Terima kasih telah berbagi pandangan Anda dengan kami, Delfi! Berdasarkan masukan, kami memahami bahwa Anda tidak sepenuhnya puas dengan layanan kami. Yakinlah, kami akan berusaha keras untuk membuat kunjungan Anda berikutnya menyenangkan. Semoga hari Anda menyenangkan! Salam, Joey
comments.reviewComments:
Overall saya senang menginap di sini. Staf ramah dan cepat membantu, kamar bersih tapi lantainya licin jika kena air. Saya rasa itu karena teknik mengepel yg salah.

Paling utama yg harus diperhatikan pengelola penginapan: Pemeliharaan sarana dan fasilitas. Ada beberapa item yg rusak tp tidak disiasati. Sekadar saran, mungkin perlu pengecekan berkala utk barang2 elektronik, contohnya heater air kamar mandi.
